Dare to Discover Austin's Dark Side

Austin's Only Ghost Tour on Wheels —

Keep
Austin
Haunted

Austin's dark history is waiting. Join us for a ghost tour unlike any other — on wheels, after dark, through the city's most haunted streets.

Book Your Tour

Choose Your Tour

No prior ghost-hunting experience required.

Van Tours

$49 / person

More seats, air conditioning, and a custom art wrap — same haunted Austin history.

Learn more →

Paranormal Investigation

$59 / person

Go hands-on with the spirits at The Clay Pit's historic Bertram Building every Saturday night.

Learn more →

Hearse Tours

from $99 / person

Climb into a classic Cadillac hearse converted into a spooky limousine and explore Austin after dark.

Learn more →

"Best ghost tour we've ever been on. Highly recommend."

— MT DAWG

"This was the coolest experience! Drove around downtown Austin in a HEARSE!! Would 1000% recommend!"

— Kylee

"This was so much fun and I even had a few ghostly interactions to my surprise! Do this!!!"

— Daphne

"One of the best haunted tours we have been on and we have done a lot."

— Joy

You bring the booze.
We'll bring the boos.

All tours are BYOB — bring your favorite drinks and enjoy the ride.
